title: SACRAMENTO
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The COVID-19 pandemic has had a disproportionately negative impact on women- and minority-owned businesses.",
    "Between February 2020 and April 2020, the number of active Black-owned businesses decreased by 41%, Latinx-owned businesses by 32%, and Asian-owned businesses by 25%.",
    "Women and minority business owners have been especially hard hit during the pandemic due to their businesses being smaller and of a younger tenure compared to other businesses.",
    "Early stage and small businesses are generally less resilient during times of economic stress.",
    "A majority of women- and minority-owned businesses operate in sectors that were hardest hit during the pandemic, such as food services and personal services.",
    "Women have faced disproportionate burdens related to caregiving during the COVID-19 pandemic, impacting their business operations.",
    "Women- and minority-owned businesses often experience unequal access to capital and public programs designed to support them.",
    "California faces recovery challenges regarding the uneven economic impacts of the pandemic on low-income communities and businesses owned by women and persons of color.",
    "There is a persistent lack of access to capital for both new and growing businesses owned by women and minorities.",
    "Systemic structural barriers exist in access to government services and compliance for women- and minority-owned businesses."
  ]
}
```
